emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas I don't have the name of the CFO at Sempra, though I'm sure he's on their website. If not, let me know.

emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas I don't have the name of the CFO at Sempra, though I'm sure he's on their website. If not, let me know.

emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas Jeff, My memory is failing me but I remember you telling me that you had a high placed contact at Sempra that you could contact to set up a meeting. Don't let me down man. I thought you told me it was the CFO. Who is your contact? Laird

emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas Jeff, My memory is failing me but I remember you telling me that you had a high placed contact at Sempra that you could contact to set up a meeting. Don't let me down man. I thought you told me it was the CFO. Who is your contact? Laird

emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Never mentioned the CFO. Let's discuss further. I can get you in. Laird Dyer@ECT 09/13/2000 06:11 AM

emails.subject: Re: PG&E and Sempra Gas
emails.body: Never mentioned the CFO. Let's discuss further. I can get you in. Laird Dyer@ECT 09/13/2000 06:11 AM
